title: Chennai Heat Wave
lead: Chennai is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.77. The city's temperature has reached critical levels with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Chennai has a significant impact on the city's weather, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 12.2 GG and zero Heating Degree Day (HDD). 
 The relative humidity is at 69%, and the wind speed is moderate at 13.2 km/h. 
 The heat wave is expected to persist, causing discomfort to the residents and affecting various sectors.
conclusion: Activate emergency measures to mitigate the heat wave's effects immediately.
